_comment: Answers for `databricks bundle init` -> sdp-meta DAB template, scenario B: bronze-only kafka ingestion. pipeline_mode is irrelevant when layer=bronze (no silver to combine), but a value is required by the schema. {uc_catalog_name}, {sdp_meta_schema}, {bronze_target_schema}, and {silver_target_schema} are substituted at runtime (driven by --uc-catalog-name and --uc-schema).
author: dab-template-demo
